description: Style NoteClassic two-hole lace-up shoe with clean, slim silhouetting and a refined stacked heel, by arrow for men. The strategic stitch detailing on this narrow shoe is a sartorial dream. Wear this shoe crafted from Italian leather with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers.Product DetailsBrown leather shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailingPadded footbed and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with herringbone and patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
